California agencies

135 agencies · 62.3 out of 100 average · 84 need attention

Expired feeds 65 of 135

These feeds have run out and dropped from trip planners. Start the program's outreach here.

Recently lapsed 21

Expired within the last year. Likely still running; a re-export with a longer calendar brings each one back into trip planners.

Expired over a year ago 44

Expired more than a year ago. The listed URL is usually still canonical, so the source stopped refreshing. Confirm the agency still runs before reading the grade as a current failure.

An open-source data quality tool for small and rural transit agencies.

Agencies: Directory · Interactive app · Map · All routes

The nation: National pulse · Common problems · NTD readiness · Realtime · Equity · What feeds publish

Tools: Compare two agencies · Check a feed before you publish · Score any feed now · Query the dataset · Feed-health alerts · Add your agency · For agencies: procurement
